attributes.additional_details: 16 is far too young to consent to sex with people 19-20+. It’s wrong and disgusting that adults are getting away with sleeping with children.
attributes.background: Either raise the age of consent or change the laws so that adults are not able to legally sleep with minors.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Change the legal age of consent to intercourse to 18
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749248

Raise the age of consent to 18 with peer exception for 16-17 year olds
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767458

Amend age-of-consent laws to protect those under 21
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747372
